$comment: Example hooks configuration for Claude Code

PreToolUse.name: block-force-push
PreToolUse.description: Prevent force pushes and hard resets

PreToolUse.name: validate-file-path
PreToolUse.description: Ensure file operations stay within project boundaries

PreToolUse.name: secret-detection
PreToolUse.description: Scan for hardcoded secrets before writing files

PostToolUse.name: auto-format-typescript
PostToolUse.description: Run Prettier on TypeScript/JavaScript files after edits

PostToolUse.name: auto-format-python
PostToolUse.description: Run Black on Python files after edits

PostToolUse.name: lint-check
PostToolUse.description: Run ESLint after JavaScript/TypeScript file modifications

PostToolUse.name: type-check
PostToolUse.description: Run TypeScript compiler check after edits

PostToolUse.name: audit-log
PostToolUse.description: Log all tool invocations for compliance tracking

Stop.name: run-unit-tests
Stop.description: Execute unit test suite before accepting session output

Stop.name: changelog-reminder
Stop.description: Remind to update changelog if source files changed

$examples.hook-script-block-force-push:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(push.*--force|reset --hard)'; then
  echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive git operation'
  exit 1
fi
exit 0
$examples.hook-script-format-ts:
#!/bin/bash
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty')
if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then
  npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null
fi
exit 0
$examples.hook-script-detect-secrets:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE '(api_key|secret|password|token)\s*[:=]\s*["'\'']((?!\$\{).)+["'\'']; then
  echo 'BLOCKED: Potential hardcoded secret detected'
  exit 1
fi
exit 0
$examples.hook-script-coverage-check:
#!/bin/bash
COVERAGE=$(npx jest --coverage --coverageReporters=text-summary 2>/dev/null | grep 'Statements' | awk '{print $3}' | tr -d '%')
if (( $(echo "$COVERAGE < 80" | bc -l) )); then
  echo "WARNING: Test coverage is ${COVERAGE}%, below 80% threshold"
  exit 1
fi
exit 0
